name: Patti's Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chicken breasts, boneless (cut into 1-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken and slice the sausage.
2. Chop the onion and green pepper.
3. Place all ingredients in a crockpot.
4. Add the remaining ingredients, except shrimp and rice.
5. Cook on low for 6-8 hours.
6. Thirty minutes before eating, add the cooked shrimp and rice; allow to heat.
7. Alternatively, cook on high for 3-4 hours instead.
